emails.subject: Why [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] keeps coming back (it's not what you think)
emails.preview: The root cause most doctors miss
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

If you've been dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] and feel like nothing you've tried has made a lasting difference, you're not alone — and you're not imagining it.

Most conventional care focuses on managing symptoms: a medication here, a referral there. But [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] often signals something deeper — an imbalance in your hormones, gut, immune system, or metabolism that hasn't been properly investigated.

At the Functional Medicine Center of New Jersey, Dr. Nicole Anderson and Dr. Kelly Blundy take a different approach. They run comprehensive testing to find the actual source of what's driving your symptoms, then build a personalized care plan around fixing that root cause — not covering it up.

[KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT] is one of the most commonly missed contributors to how patients with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] feel. It's not always obvious, and standard lab panels often don't catch it.

If you'd like to understand what's really going on, we'd love to be your next step.

Warm regards,
The Care Team at Functional Medicine Center of New Jersey

emails.subject: Think of your body like a bucket (this changes everything)
emails.preview: A simple way to understand why you feel off
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Here's an analogy that helps explain why so many people struggle with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] even when their standard labs look 'normal.'

Imagine your body is a bucket. Every stressor — toxin exposure, poor sleep, nutrient gaps, chronic inflammation, hormonal shifts — adds water to that bucket. For years, your body compensates. Then one day, the bucket overflows, and you start to feel it: fatigue, weight changes, brain fog, [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM].

Conventional medicine often tries to bail out the bucket with medications. Functional medicine asks: what kept filling it up in the first place?

Dr. Anderson and Dr. Blundy use advanced testing to identify your individual stressors — the inputs that have been quietly filling your bucket. [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS] is often a key part of that investigation for patients with your symptom pattern.

This is not about chasing symptoms. It's about understanding your biology deeply enough to change the outcome.

We're here when you're ready.

Warm regards,
The Care Team at Functional Medicine Center of New Jersey

emails.subject: What changed when she finally found the root cause
emails.preview: A patient story that might sound familiar
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

A patient — we'll call her M. — came to us after years of [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM], weight fluctuations, and crushing fatigue. She had seen multiple specialists and was told her labs were 'within normal range.' She had nearly given up.

After a thorough intake and functional testing, we found several overlapping root causes: subclinical thyroid dysfunction, significant gut permeability, and early insulin resistance. None had been connected before.

We built a targeted plan addressing all three. Over the following months, her energy returned, her weight stabilized, and [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] became manageable for the first time in years.

M.'s story is one of many. Results vary — every patient's biology is different, and functional medicine takes time and commitment. But when the right root causes are identified and addressed, the difference can be profound.

If [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT] resonated with you, we'd love to sit down and review your picture.

With care,
Dr. Nicole Anderson, Dr. Kelly Blundy, and the Team at Functional Medicine Center of New Jersey

My weight fluctuates without changes to my diet

Gut Health: I experience bloating after most meals

I have skin issues I think may be related to my gut

careModels.name: New Patient Comprehensive Evaluation
careModels.desc: An in-depth initial visit including a full health history review, functional lab analysis, and a personalized root-cause care plan built around your specific biology.

careModels.name: Hormone & Metabolic Health Program
careModels.desc: Targeted assessment and treatment for hormonal imbalances, thyroid dysfunction, adrenal fatigue, and insulin resistance using advanced functional testing.

careModels.name: Gut Restoration & Detoxification
careModels.desc: Comprehensive gut health evaluation including gastrointestinal detoxification protocols, microbiome analysis, and personalized healing plans.

careModels.name: Advanced Therapy Add-Ons
careModels.desc: Integrative therapies including PEMF, hyperbaric oxygen therapy (HBOT), and SOT treatment for complex chronic conditions and recovery optimization.
